gaming.bio: 10 years old. pro fortnite w's, roblox glitches, brawl stars trios — and the wildest reactions on youtube. smash that subscribe.

football.bio: 10 years old. real madrid till i die, hat-tricks at recess, and i post every backyard golazo on youtube. hala madrid y nada más.

about: yo. i'm khalil. i'm 10. i play *fortnite*, *roblox*, and *brawl stars*, and i post the clips that make my friends scream. when i'm not gaming i'm chasing a football around — biggest *real madrid* fan you'll ever meet, and yeah, i'm definitely ronaldo when i grow up.
i'm also writing my own book (more on that below) and trying to hit my first 1k subs. if you read this far you're a real one — go smash subscribe.

book.title: The Goat Chronicles
book.subtitle: stories my grandma started and i'm finishing
book.description: My grandma started it with me last Christmas — now I'm finishing it myself. Stories, drawings, and the funniest stuff that happens at school. First copies dropping soon.
